pdp_main_selling_points: Gentler bath water for baby/sensitive skin; reduces chlorine and irritants; BPA-free silicone spout cover; color-changing temperature gauge; tool-free install on most tub spouts; 90-day filter replacement; dishwasher-cleanable parts.
review_support_signals: 20/26 reviews are 4-5 star; positive labels include install/fit 9 and baby/sensitive scenario 7; archived customer images confirm the silicone spout-cover form, manual, box and adapter/insert pieces.
review_counter_signals: Negative labels include overflow/flow path 3, refill/lifespan 5, claim dispute 2, overall ineffective 2. Review sample is still small and does not verify contaminant removal.
score_reason: Core physical/form-factor claims are visually and textually supported, but water-quality and skin-outcome claims remain review-perception only. Flow and refill caveats keep it below 80.

brand_route: Crystal Quest / classic bath-ball technical benchmark
pdp_main_selling_points: Bath-ball tub faucet filter; removes chlorine, lead and impurities; pH-balanced clean bath water; 2,500-gallon lifespan; easy install; fits most tubs but not universal; BPA-free.
review_support_signals: Small positive signal around install/fit 5, skin/hair 3, baby/kids 2, chlorine smell 1; archived images confirm bath-ball hanging form, refill/hard-handle packets and top grille/water-flow path.
review_counter_signals: Only 19 reviews in corpus; 42.1% are 1-2 star; high-kill negatives 8; overall ineffective 6; overflow/flow path 3; refill/lifespan 2; install instability 1; resale concern 1.
score_reason: Physical bath-ball form is supported, but broad contaminant and long-life claims are not review-verified and the small corpus has a high negative share.

pdp_main_selling_points: Organic cotton bath faucet filter; filters 99.9% chlorine; adds magnesium and zinc minerals; sensitive skin/baby/eczema positioning; anti-slip strap; easy install; 2-month or 4,755-gallon lifespan; rinse and air dry after use.
review_support_signals: Large corpus and customer images confirm soft cloth/mesh hanging route, cotton bag, loofah-like mesh and drawstring pouch. Positive labels include install/fit 21 and baby/sensitive scenario 16.
review_counter_signals: 1-2 star share is 37.1%; high-kill negatives 142; overall ineffective 65; mold/hygiene 57; claim dispute 34; baby/sensitive effect unstable 29; quality 29; overflow/flow path 25.
score_reason: The soft hanging format is real, but the core promise around chlorine/minerals/sensitive-skin comfort is heavily challenged by effect, hygiene and claim-boundary complaints.

brand_route: Beati Faucet / high-sales low-price bath-ball route
pdp_main_selling_points: Hard water softener; removes contaminants, chlorine and fluoride; improves skin/hair/nails; spa-like soft water; fits all tubs/all standard faucets; fast uninterrupted filtration; easy install with standard and flexible handles.
review_support_signals: Strong review-level support: 92.4% are 4-5 star; positive labels include install/fit 71 and skin/hair 29. Negative share is comparatively low.
review_counter_signals: Broad claims create risk: 'fits all tubs', hard-water softening, fluoride/contaminant removal and circulation/oxygen language are not review-verified. High-kill negatives 22; overall ineffective 16; overflow/flow path 7; claim dispute 7; quality 7.
score_reason: Customer satisfaction is high, but the PDP overstates fit and contaminant/softening claims. Accurate for easy-use/low-price appeal, less accurate for technical water-treatment promises.

pdp_main_selling_points: Overflow/splash guard bath filter; 2,500-gallon filtration; removes contaminants, chlorine and fluoride; hard-water softener; improves skin/hair/nails; durable ABS; two suspension cords fit almost any tub faucet; economical high quality.
review_support_signals: Largest corpus. Positive labels are strong: install/fit 352, skin/hair 205, baby/sensitive 186, chlorine 34, flow stable 11. 87.4% of reviews are 4-5 star.
review_counter_signals: High-kill negatives 133 and high-star mixed complaints 116. Key conflicts: overall ineffective 79, refill/lifespan 66, overflow/flow path 61, claim dispute 44, baby/sensitive instability 32, quality 32.
score_reason: The basic value/easy-install story is well supported, but the very claims it emphasizes, overflow control, universal-ish fit, long life and hard-water/contaminant removal, generate meaningful counter-evidence.

brand_route: Tubo / premium-ish baby bath filter route
pdp_main_selling_points: 8-stage bath filter; removes up to 99% chlorine, heavy metals and harmful contaminants; gentler bath for sensitive skin/children; upgraded overflow solution prevents overflow even with strong water pressure; tool-free install on most standard tub faucets; travel-friendly.
review_support_signals: Some support exists for baby/sensitive use 6, install/fit 4, flow stable 3 and chlorine 2.
review_counter_signals: The core claims are directly challenged: high-kill negatives 14/76; overall ineffective 11; claim dispute 8; quality 8; overflow/flow path 7; refill/lifespan 6. The 'prevents overflow even with strong water pressure' claim is especially exposed.
score_reason: Premium baby positioning is not matched by the review evidence. Technical and overflow promises are too strong for the observed complaint pattern.

pdp_main_selling_points: 8,000-gallon or 10-12 month lifespan; removes chlorine, fluoride, heavy metals and odors; hard-water softener; vitamin C, mineralizing and magnetic energy spheres; KDF55/activated carbon/calcium sulfite/zeolite/tourmaline; universal install; high-temperature ABS.
review_support_signals: Very high star support: 94.4% are 4-5 star. Positive labels include install/fit 16 and baby/sensitive 9. High-kill negatives are only 5 in this corpus.
review_counter_signals: The claim stack is aggressive relative to review evidence. Refill/lifespan complaints 7, quality 4, claim dispute 3 and baby/sensitive instability 3 appear despite small-medium sample size.
score_reason: Good customer sentiment supports the simple low-price/easy-use appeal, but long-life, hard-water, heavy-metal and multi-media claims remain unverified and should be treated as high-overclaim risk.

pdp_main_selling_points: Adjustable Velcro tool-free install; most standard faucets and travel use; 8 filter media / 10-stage purification; removes fluoride, chlorine, heavy metals, rust and impurities; pH balancing; sensitive skin/mothers/infants/pets; 2,500-gallon maintenance; rinse before first use and moderate flow to avoid overflow.
review_support_signals: High star support at 91.5%; positive labels include baby/sensitive 7, install/fit 6 and skin/hair 4. The PDP includes useful disclaimers about first-use residue and moderate flow.
review_counter_signals: Small corpus. Claim dispute 4, refill/lifespan 3, overflow/flow path 2, overall ineffective 2 and shedding/residue 3 appear. Technical removal and pH claims remain unsupported by reviews.
score_reason: The physical Velcro/easy-use story is plausible and the warning language improves honesty, but 10-stage/fluoride/heavy-metal/pH claims are still broad for the available evidence.

pdp_main_selling_points: Vitamin C and mineral infusion; 8-stage defense with 99% elimination; KDF55/activated carbon/calcium sulfite; blocks chlorine, heavy metals, rust and limescale; nearly any bathtub faucet; Velcro option; no drip/no splash/no wait; high-temperature ABS; prevents leaks, cracks and media breakdown.
review_support_signals: 88.4% 4-5 star. Positive labels include install/fit 12 and chlorine 4. High-kill negatives are 7.
review_counter_signals: Claims are unusually broad: 99% elimination, limescale, no drip/no splash/no wait and no leaks/cracks/media breakdown. Counter-signals include refill/lifespan 7, claim dispute 6, overall ineffective 4, overflow/flow path 2 and baby/sensitive instability 2.
score_reason: Reviews broadly support easy use, but technical removal, limescale/softening and no-splash/no-leak claims exceed the evidence level.

pdp_main_selling_points: Solid metal lead-free housing; multi-stage filtration with 99% removal; removes chlorine, heavy metals, rust, sediment and odors; softens hard water; 15L/min high flow with 100% filtering efficiency and zero overflow; baby/pregnant/sensitive skin; 3-second tool-free universal install fits 99% of faucets.
review_support_signals: No 1-2 star reviews in the 13-row corpus; positive labels include baby/sensitive 3 and install/fit 2.
review_counter_signals: Very small sample. Claim dispute 2, refill/lifespan 2 and mold/hygiene 1 appear. The PDP makes the strongest technical promises in the set: 99% removal, 100% filtering efficiency, zero overflow, 15L/min and 99% faucet fit, none of which are review-verifiable.
score_reason: Low negative signal is useful but not enough to validate the very aggressive technical/universal-fit claims. Score is held down mainly by overclaim and tiny sample size.
